name: agent-guards
description: Runnable guard skills for long-lived AI agents — token budget audits, hallucination triage, and cross-surface open-loop tracking. Every skill returns an exit code you can enforce in CI.

plugins.name: agent-guards
plugins.description: Three production-tested guard skills for autonomous agents: context-budget (audit per-turn token cost, fail CI when the agent gets fatter), claim-audit (separate grounded/hedged/bare factual claims to catch likely hallucinations), and open-loops (extract unresolved commitments, deferrals, and open questions from a transcript so cron/triggers don't lose thread context). Dependency-light Python, exit-code gates, not prompt wrappers.
